<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>

<li>insomnia (disease)（96.4%）</li>
<li>congenital isolated adrenocorticotropic hormone deficiency (disease)（96.0%）</li>
<li>autosomal dominant slowed nerve conduction velocity（95.5%）</li>
<li>schizoid personality disorder（95.4%）</li>
<li>histrionic personality disorder (disease)（95.4%）</li>
<li>schizotypal personality disorder（95.4%）</li>
<li>paranoid personality disorder（95.4%）</li>

<li>narcissistic personality disorder（91.4%）</li>
</ul></li>
